race.description: Country Music Raceday On Sale Now (Bm78) Hcp
race.comment: MOULIN MISS (7) has a handy record over this track and trip with a win and two seconds from five attempts and gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim. Looks the one they all have to run down. HEARTONI (2) saves his best form for this sprint journey and will be rock-hard fit for this contest. Has the ability to take this out. The well-related SHAKO (5) (half to G2 winner Arcaded) is a very consistent commodity who doesn't know how to run a bad race. Include from the inside alley. INVAHIR (3) resumes here but has a solid first-up record and any market support must be noted. RALPHIE (8) next in line.
